name: Bakewell Pudding (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F or Mark 7.
2. Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface and line a wide shallow dish or pie plate.
3. Spread the pastry with a thick layer of strawberry jam.
4. In a bowl, cream together butter and sugar.
5. Add egg yolks, beaten egg whites, and almond essence to the mixture; mix well.
6. Spread the egg mixture over the jam in the dish.
7. Bake at 425°F or Mark 7 for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F or Mark 4 and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
9. The filling is meant to remain soft and is not intended to set.
This recipe reportedly originated accidentally when a cook at the Rutland Arms in Bakewell added the egg mixture on top of the jam instead of the pastry for a special strawberry tart. The Bakewell Pudding Shop claims to be the sole purveyors of the authentic pudding, with the recipe passed down exclusively within family members.
